## 5. Integrations and Environment Variables

### Supabase

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` | Yes |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` | Yes |
| `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` | Yes |
| `SUPABASE_DB_URL` | No |
| `SUPABASE_DB_URL_POOLED` | No |

### Anthropic

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | Yes |
| `GEMINI_API_KEY` | Yes |

### Inngest (workflow automation)

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `INNGEST_EVENT_KEY` | Yes |
| `INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY` | Yes |

### Resend (email alerts)

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `RESEND_API_KEY` | Yes |
| `RESEND_FROM_EMAIL` | Yes |

### Stripe (premium tier)

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` | Yes |
| `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` | Yes |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` | Yes |
| `STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID` | No |

### App

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL` | Yes |
| `CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` | Yes |
| `CRON_SECRET` | Yes |

### Distributed Rate Limiting (recommended for production)

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL` | Yes |
| `UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN` | Yes |

### Monitoring / Error Tracking

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `SENTRY_DSN` | Yes |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN` | Yes |
| `SENTRY_ORG` | Yes |
| `SENTRY_PROJECT` | Yes |
| `SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN` | Yes |
| `HEALTHCHECK_SECRET` | Yes |

### Product Analytics (PostHog)

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY` | Yes |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_HOST` | Yes |

### Admin dashboard

| Variable | Required |
|---|---|
| `ADMIN_EMAIL` | Yes |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_EMAIL` | Yes |

## 11. Update Policy (Mandatory)

1. Every behavior, API, schema, workflow, or env-var change must regenerate this dossier.
2. CI blocks merges when this file is stale (`npm run pm:dossier:check`).
3. PR reviewers must verify the "PM dossier freshness" check is green before approval.
